content.speakerText: I’ve been watching your journey—you’ve inspired me to push harder.
content.speakerTextCn: 我一直关注你的成长，你激励我更努力了。
expectedAnswers: Aw, that means a lot coming from you!
I’m truly honored—I hope you’re proud of how far you’ve come too.
That’s so encouraging, thank you! You’re inspiring me too.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否真诚回应了对方的赞美
语言准确性：语法和词汇使用是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合英语母语者日常表达习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'coming from you' 或类似强调对方认可的表达

content.speakerText: I’m just getting started—I’ve got big goals ahead.
content.speakerTextCn: 我才刚起步，前面还有大目标呢。
expectedAnswers: Then I’ll be first in line cheering you on!
You’ve got the drive—I know you’ll crush it.
I believe in you—your determination will take you further than you think.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否给予积极鼓励并认可对方的雄心
语言准确性：语法和词汇是否准确，是否避免消极表达
表达自然度：是否使用了地道口语表达如 'crush it' 或 'cheering you on'
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'crush it', 'cheering you on', 或 'drive' 等关键词

content.speakerText: You’ve overcome so much—I really admire how you stay positive.
content.speakerTextCn: 你克服了这么多困难，我真的很佩服你保持积极的态度。
expectedAnswers: Thank you—that means the world to me.
I appreciate that so much. Your own resilience inspires me too.
It’s not always easy, but your support keeps me going.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达了感激并回馈正面情感
语言准确性：是否避免了否定或轻视对方赞美
表达自然度：是否使用了自然、有情感的回应，而非机械应付
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'means the world', 'appreciate', 'inspires me' 等情感表达
